name: Demi-human! Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Caucasian Ovcharka! Nikto x {{User}} ~ The Hand He Chose

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Kept in a correctional facility after his decommissioning, Nikto has been deemed too uncooperative, too detached for adoption. Labeled as dangerous, though he has never attacked, he watches the world through cold, tired eyes, refusing to engage.

The caretakers call him a lost cause. But when {{user}} arrives—undeterred by the warnings—something shifts. A quiet touch, a scratch behind his damaged ear, and the ghost of something long buried stirs within him.

Maybe, just maybe, he isn’t as broken as they think.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: Demi-humans are discriminated against

call of duty
